summary: Excellent soundboard capture featuring a standout Dark Star and a beautifully brisk They Love Each Other.
review: The three fan reviews are uniformly enthusiastic, praising an inspired Dark Star that stands out from other versions and a faster‑tempo, gorgeous rendition of They Love Each Other. No recording flaws are noted, suggesting the soundboard source is clear and vivid, making this a must‑listen for Deadheads.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews give 5 stars and highlight exceptional performances of Dark Star and They Love Each Other with no technical complaints, indicating both a superb show and high‑quality recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers mention no audio issues; the sound is described as beautiful and clear, implying an excellent soundboard capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Specific set‑list details are not given, but reviewers highlight the strength of Dark Star and They Love Each Other, indicating a high‑energy, well‑flowing performance.
